caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with gold lettering that reads "BOSS TALK" sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a desk with a professional microphone on a boom arm in front of him. In the background, a white wall features a repeating logo with five stars and the words "UNION HUSTLE," while a blue sign above reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A black container with red and white text, "THE TALK OUT," sits on the desk. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar seated position, looking slightly to his left and speaking into the microphone. His facial expression and posture remain relatively consistent across the frames, with minimal movement, suggesting a continuous shot of him during a podcast or interview recording.
